data.title: Madrigal Pharma granted an equity award to new Chief Accounting Officer Rita Thakkar under its 2025 Inducement Plan.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, Madrigal Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ:MDGL) based in Conshohocken, PA, disclosed granting an equity award to Rita Thakkar, their recently appointed Chief Accounting Officer. The award was provided as an equity inducement award pursuant to Madrigal's 2025 Inducement Plan and was approved by the company's Board of Directors following Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). Madrigal Pharmaceuticals is a biopharmaceutical firm concentrating on developing innovative treatments for metabolic dysfunction-associated steatohepatitis (MASH).

data.title: Oportun CEO Raul Vazquez to step down by April 3, 2026. Board starts CEO search. Preliminary Q4 & full-year 2025 results shared.
data.description: CEO and Board member Raul Vazquez will be resigning by April 3, 2026. The Board has started the search for a new CEO. They have also released the preliminary financial and operating results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025.

data.title: Axogen plans to offer $85.0 million in common stock, with an option for $12.75 million more, in a public offering.
data.description: Axogen, Inc., a leading global company specializing in innovative surgical solutions for restoring peripheral nerve function, has announced its plan to conduct a proposed underwritten public offering. The offering includes $85.0 million worth of shares of its common stock, with an additional option for the underwriters to purchase up to $12.75 million more. All shares in the offering will be sold by Axogen. The completion of the offering, as well as its final size and terms, are subject to market and other conditions and there is no assurance on its timing.

data.title: Capital Southwest hires Ryan Mullins as Managing Director, expert in financing middle market businesses. Nasdaq: CSWC.
data.description: On January 21, 2026, in Dallas, Capital Southwest Corporation (Nasdaq: CSWC), an internally managed business development company, welcomed Ryan Mullins as the new Managing Director. Capital Southwest specializes in offering adaptable financing options to aid in the expansion and acquisition of middle market businesses.

data.title: Neurocrine Biosciences (Nasdaq: NBIX) announces Q4 and year-end 2025 financial results call on Feb 11, 1:30 p.m. San Diego time.
data.description: A conference call and webcast have been planned by Neurocrine Biosciences, Inc. for Wednesday, February 11, 2026. The company, listed on Nasdaq as NBIX, shared that their fourth quarter and year-end financial results for 2025 will be discussed during the event scheduled for 1:30 p.m. on the set date.

data.title: WhiteFiber plans $200M private placement of convertible senior notes for AI infrastructure, HPC solutions.
data.description: WhiteFiber, Inc., a leading provider of artificial intelligence infrastructure and high-performance computing solutions, revealed plans to offer a new financial product on the market. The company, listed on Nasdaq as WYFI, stated its intention on Jan. 21, 2026. While specific details of the offer were not disclosed, WhiteFiber highlighted that this move is subject to favorable market conditions. This development signals the company's strategic pivot towards expanding its services and capitalizing on the growing demand for AI and HPC technology. Investors and industry analysts are closely monitoring WhiteFiber's next steps as they navigate this evolving landscape.

data.title: Princeton Bancorp declared a $0.35 quarterly cash dividend per share on Jan. 21, 2026.
data.description: Princeton Bancorp, Inc., the parent company of The Bank of Princeton, recently declared a cash dividend of $0.35 per share at a Board of Directors meeting held on January 21, 2026. The company, listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol BPRN, made this announcement from Princeton, New Jersey.

data.title: CEO Coaching International partners with iSupport Worldwide to assist owner-led companies in global team management.
data.description: In Miami on January 21, 2026, CEO Coaching International, a top CEO coaching firm serving growth-focused CEOs and entrepreneurs worldwide, announced iSupport Worldwide as its Diamond Strategic Partner. This partnership aims to assist owner-led companies in developing secure and compliant operations.

data.title: Ziegler closes $357.2M financing for Deerfield Episcopal Retirement Community in Chicago.
data.description: In Chicago on January 21, 2026, Ziegler announced the completion of the Deerfield Episcopal Retirement Community's Series 2026 Bonds totaling $357,225,000. Deerfield Episcopal Retirement Community, located in North [location not provided], was the beneficiary of this successful financial transaction.
